events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, high risk. Slings routed over unprotected edges with no padding/corner protection is a clear violation of OSHA 1926.251(a)(1) and ASME B30 sling-protection requirements — the sharp edge can cut/abrade the sling and cause sudden failure under load, so the lift must stop until edge protection is installed and slings are re-inspected.
